description: VOL XXXIII NO 333 BRYAN BOOMERS STORM NEW YORK TRAINLOADS ARE FLOCKING TO THE METROPOLIS Many States Will Send Delegations to Cheer the Nebraska Com moner Simple Reception at Battery Thursday B Asodated Press NEW YORK Aug 28 The town is filling up with Bryan welcomers and other excursionists Prom now on until the day of the reception delegations from all over the country will be arriving almost hourly and they will bring with them a lot of others Attorney General M J Cunningham of Louisiana reported at the Victoria hotel headquarters that he expected a delegation of about 25 from New Orleans Wednesday and for whom he Is looking up accommodations The West Virginians have begun to decorate j at j the j hotel Breslln where they will have headquarters I The Mlssourlans and Illinois men who will lead the delegations in point of numbers arrived today The St Louis Democratic club 250 strong is at the Saranac The Iroquois club of St Joseph will reach here on a special train on Wednesday morning lowa Is sending a delegation of about 200 by a special train The Arizona men about IB of whom are expected will stay at the
